message:
test(e2e): add reliability and diagnostics E2E tests (bd-2gkx.10)

Add Playwright E2E tests covering health endpoints, circuit breaker state
reporting, dependency-aware diagnostics with cascade failure validation,
component status structure, response caching, and WebSocket event loss
telemetry. Uses testLogger fixture for structured diagnostic capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
